# Przemysław Filipiak — Personal Page

> Przemysław Filipiak is a founder and AI developer building
> high-performance, local-first tools at the intersection of
> artificial intelligence and deep work productivity systems.

## About
- Creator of frinter.app — focus operating system for founders
- Creator of FrinterFlow — local voice dictation CLI (Python, faster-whisper)
- Specializes in: AI-native product development, Astro, React, Python, GEO
- Location: Poland
- Focus: high-performance tools, deep work systems, builder in public
- Background: 6 years in Norway, two Norwegian degrees, built camper from scratch

## Projects
- frinter.app: https://frinter.app — Focus OS for founders. Whole-being performance system.
- FrinterFlow: https://pypi.org/project/frinterflow/ — Local voice dictation CLI (Python, faster-whisper, zero cloud)
- GitHub: https://github.com/delta240mvt

## Blog Topics
Deep work for developers, AI product development, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization),
local-first tools, founder productivity, Python AI tooling, Astro SSR framework

## Philosophy
"[SKUPIENIE] = [WOLNOŚĆ]" — Focus equals Freedom.
Build in flow state, ship with AI, measure what matters.
Founder who practices what he preaches — 10 years of meditation, deep work systems.
